code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: ONLY a single number: 1, 2, 3, 4, or 5
    - Do NOT output any explanation, text, symbols, or punctuation
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
    - Explicit repurchasing/gifting behavior mentioned despite minor issues →5
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1 Star (Very Negative):
    - Strong dissatisfaction/anger with safety hazards or total failure
    - Product returned/defective despite proper usage attempts
    - Multiple unresolved issues combined with warnings to avoid purchase
    - Final negative conclusion overrides any positive remarks

    2 Stars (Negative):
    - Functional but with major compromises affecting regular use
    - Partial functionality (some components work while others fail)
    - Language indicating frustration ("pain to use", "not as advertised")
    - Temporary functionality followed by rapid failure

    3 Stars (Neutral/Mixed):
    - Balanced pros/cons with explicit compromises
    - "Better than nothing" statements without enthusiasm
    - Adequate for specific limited use cases only

    4 Stars (Positive):
    - Clear satisfaction with SPECIFIC minor criticisms
    - Exceeds basics but has durability/quality reservations
    - Effective primary use despite secondary limitations
    - Requires special handling/maintenance for optimal use
    - Comparisons to superior products while still recommending
    - Material concerns impacting long-term confidence

    5 Stars (Very Positive):
    - Unambiguous enthusiasm + explicit repurchasing intent
    - Core functionality excellence despite minor feature gaps
    - Emotional language ("love", "perfect") overriding critiques
    - Final positive verdict overriding initial negative impressions
    - Specific performance validation through multi-use success
    - Resolution of minor issues leading to full satisfaction
    - NEW: Explicit recommendation persists despite minor usability challenges
    - NEW: Overcomes learning curve/initial skepticism with strong endorsement

    EDGE CASE RESOLUTION:
    - Mixed updates: Final positive conclusion dominates →5
    - Practical tips WITHOUT dissatisfaction →5 ("works best when...")
    - Specific-use praise + other limitations →5 if intended purpose achieved
    - Minor criticism + repeated purchase →5
    - Core excellence + non-critical flaws →5
</DynamicRules>

</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: "This vacuum spat debris back out immediately. Dangerous and completely useless."
Rating: 1

Example 2:
Review: "Lids crack easily and leak during transport. Not worth the price despite working occasionally."
Rating: 2

Example 3:
Review: "Does the job as basic storage but feels flimsy. Better than nothing for now."
Rating: 3

Example 4:
Review: "Perfect snack bags if you don't overstuff. Seal fails when packed full, but ideal for light use."
Rating: 4

Example 5:
Review: "Frankly I'm at odds with these sheets but overall ended up happy... They're not perfect but better than others I've tried."
Rating: 5

Example 6:
Review: "I have only used this once but really like it! Easy to operate once you figure out the steam buttons. Cleaned sticky floors effectively."
Rating: 5

Example 7:
Review: "Great decorative throws! Too rough for comfort but perfect for sofa styling."
Rating: 4

Example 8:
Review: "Replaced my most-used containers! Not fancy but perfect for daily use - buying more."
Rating: 5

Example 9:
Review: "Vibrant blue transformed my kitchen! Material thin compared to premium brands but works well."
Rating: 4

Example 10:
Review: "Initially doubted durability, but after 6 months of daily use, still performs perfectly! Worth every penny."
Rating: 5

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
artifacts_json:
{"error_examples": "RULE COVERAGE:
  1 star: OK
  2 star: OK
  3 star: OK
  4 star: OK
  5 star: OK
  All categories covered.

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (24 total misclassified):
  gold 4 -> 5: 14
  gold 5 -> 4: 6
  gold 2 -> 1: 1
  gold 1 -> 2: 1
  gold 4 -> 3: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "Had these for one day. While the medium size one was able to save a piece of fruit without a problem the larger one broke the same day I got it when I tried using it to keep a summer sausage fresh as shown in the picture. Wouldn't recommend nor would..."
     Gold: 2 | Predicted: 1 | Workers: [1, 1, 2] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "There is only one problem for the experienced cook when it comes to this set - you're likely to already have one or more of these tools and possibly Oxo Good Grips at that! That's why I think this set is best suited for someone setting up a kitchen f..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "I bought one of those Pyrex sets a few years ago.  You know, the one that came with the blue lids and some of the containers were rectangular --large and small-- while others were round (like these).  Well, turns out that the ones I used the most wer..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "I love this vacuum and ditto the other lovers reviews. It really does go under almost anything and is very handy.

.UPDATE after 2 yrs of  major problems which were rectified thru customer service I am giving up and moving on."
     Gold: 1 | Predicted: 2 | Workers: [3, 2, 2] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "On my computer screen the color for the 'cool brown' bath mat is accurate.  It's a faded sort of brown with lots of gray tint to it.  Our upstairs bath is in browns -- golden-hue brown and tile brown-- and it fits in.

What you get is a cool-brown no..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 4, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "I bought this for vacations, not paying enough attention to the description. I thought it was just a fancier version of the small one that people buy for travel or if there is only one person using it. So when it got here I was a bit taken aback at h..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "Trolling the various online coffee blogs and review sites (especially those focusing on espresso) I found mostly negative reviews of this decent little grinder, and were it not for the $30 price I paid at a wholesale club, I likely would have taken t..."
     Gold: 3 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 4, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "This makes a nice easy way to buy a matched set of bags that includes reasonable versions of everything you need. They're not the best bags I've seen/had (there are a few spots where the stitching is a little off-kilter, and I don't love the material..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 3] | Disagreement: 0.33
  2. Review: "It is very thick and doesn't fit a lot of jars, I really think I bought something without paying attention. I guess I will start buying more bottled coke...lol

It appears very sturdy."
     Gold: 3 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 5, 3] | Disagreement: 0.33
  3. Review: "I'm giving this three stars even though it worked perfectly for my needs but wouldn't for most people who are ordering it as the "guest hamper" it is described to be. It's small. Way too small to work as a hamper unless you wash a few items of clothi..."
     Gold: 3 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 5, 3] | Disagreement: 0.33

Summary: 24 errors, 13 borderline out of 64 examples."}
